data.title: EDF power solutions North America Signs Agreement with Southern California Public Power Authority for Solar Project
data.description: EDF power solutions North America has recently disclosed the signing of a lengthy 30-year Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with the Southern California Public Power Authority (SCPPA). This agreement pertains to the production from a sizable 400-megawatt (MW)dc/300 MWac solar initiative, recognized as the Utah Solar 1 Energy project. The PPA is specifically for the Los Angeles Department of Water and Power (LADWP), a participating member. Utah Solar 1 project is situated on state-run lands overseen by the Utah Trust Lands Administration (TLA) in Mill, guaranteeing significant renewable energy generation for the region.
Overall voting privileges involved.

data.title: Pollo AI Launches Marketing Studio with Five Workflows for AI Video Ads
data.description: Today, in Singapore on May 29, 2026, Pollo AI unveiled Marketing Studio, an innovative workspace powered by AI. This platform is curated to assist marketers and brands in swiftly transforming product concepts and resources into refined video advertisements within minutes. Marketing Studio boasts a range of features and tools, enabling users to seamlessly create engaging content with ease.

data.title: Stevie Kim Receives the Assoenologi International Communication Award 2026
data.description: An award has been granted to Stevie Kim, the Managing Partner of Vinitaly and Founder of Italian Wine Podcast, for her efforts in enhancing Italian wine culture on a global scale. The recognition was received in Verona, Italy on May 29, 2026. Kim's contribution to promoting Italian wine has been acknowledged through this prestigious accolade.

data.title: Powerfleet to Attend June Investor Conferences
data.description: In Woodcliff Lake, N.J. on May 29, 2026, Powerfleet, Inc. disclosed its plan to participate in investor conferences in June 2026. This presents an opportunity for investors to engage with the company's leadership and delve into discussions regarding Powerfleet's AIoT platform, which has exhibited notable success on a large scale. The company, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol AIOT, aims to showcase the platform's efficiency and impact.

data.title: CONECTIV and SONOPRESS Sign Strategic Agreement to Expand Sustainable EcoRecord Manufacturing in North America
data.description: In a recent announcement on May 29, 2026, CONECTIV and SONOPRESS have joined forces in a strategic partnership aimed at boosting EcoRecord production for the North American sector. The agreement, signed in GUETERSLOH, Germany and MEMPHIS, Tennessee, involves CONECTIV acquiring and overseeing operations related to the initiative. This collaboration is set to significantly enhance EcoRecord output in the region and is poised to have a significant impact on the market.

data.title: ProVen Growth & Income VCT plc to list additional securities for trading.
data.description: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8%, which is a significant decrease from the previous quarter. The number of jobs added in the last month alone totaled 250,000, marking a notable increase in employment opportunities. Additionally, the stock market saw a record high with the Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching 35,000 points. This positive economic news has created optimism among investors and analysts, who predict further growth in the coming months.

data.title: Footwear Retailer Genesco Sees Momentum Build Across Key Brands, Raises Outlook
data.description: Genesco Inc. (NYSE: GCO) saw its stock price increase following the release of its first-quarter sales report that surpassed Wall Street's expectations. The retailer reported a 3% year-over-year increase in revenue, reaching $487.0 million, beating the consensus estimate of $475.0 million. Comparable sales also rose by 2%, driven by a 3% increase in store sales. The company reported an adjusted loss of $2.18 per share for the quarter, narrower than the anticipated loss of $2.56 per share. Genesco's gross margin expanded by 30 basis points, attributed to lower shipping and warehouse costs as well as reduced promotional activity. The positive results have led to an optimistic outlook for the full year, prompting the company to raise its earnings forecast. Additionally, investors reacted positively to Genesco's cost-cutting measures and the potential tariff refunds that could enhance profitability in the future. The company's strong performance across its key brands indicates improving momentum in its business operations.

data.title: Zenylitics Announces Leadership Transition to Continue Accelerated Growth
data.description: On May 29, 2026, a managed conversation intelligence firm, Zenylitics, shared news about an upcoming leadership change scheduled for September 30, 2026. Ken Pedersen, who has been the CEO since 2019, will transition to the position of Chairman. Zenylitics is experiencing rapid growth and this move signifies a strategic shift in its management structure.

data.title: Kun Peng International Ltd. Announces 1-for-10 Reverse Stock Split
data.description: In a press release on May 29, 2026, Kun Peng International Ltd. (OTCQB: KPEA) revealed plans for a 1-for-ten reverse split of its $0.0001 par value common stock, scheduled for implementation on June 2, 2026. This strategic move, approved by the Board of Directors and shareholders on January 20, 2026, will reduce the company's existing 400,000,000 shares of common stock to approximately 40,000,000 shares. Additionally, there was agreement on amending the Company’s Articles of Incorporation to lower the total authorized shares of common stock from 1,000,000,000 to 100,000,000 shares and increase the par value from $0.0001 to $0.001.

data.title: Tigé Z3 Named 2026 Top Product, the Only Wakesurf Boat on Boating Industry's List
data.description: Tigé Boats, Inc., a prominent manufacturer of premium wake surf boats, has achieved consecutive Top Product awards with their latest model. Following the recognition of the Ultré ZX in 2025, the company's newest offering, the Tigé Z3, has been selected for Boating Industry's prestigious 2026 Top Product list. Based in ABILENE, Texas, Tigé continues to impress with their innovative designs and high-quality vessels.

data.title: Cuprina Holdings Announces Completion of Reverse Stock Split and Requests a Hearing before the Nasdaq Hearings Panel to Maintain Listing
data.description: Singapore, May 29, 2026 - Cuprina Holdings (Cayman) Limited (Nasdaq: CUPR), a biomedical company focusing on chronic wounds, infertility, medical waste recycling, and cosmeceuticals, recently completed a reverse stock split on May 27, 2026. Following this, the company requested a hearing before the Nasdaq Hearings Panel in response to a staff determination letter received the same day. The letter, issued by the Nasdaq Listing Qualifications Department, informed Cuprina that, due to its failure to meet the minimum bid price of $1.00 per share as required for continued listing on The Nasdaq Capital Market, the company's securities face delisting unless an appeal is made to the Panel.

data.title: ChristianaCare to Open Aston Campus Neighborhood Hospital in Early June, Bringing 24/7 Emergency Care to Delaware County, PA
data.description: Delaware County residents will soon have access to a new around-the-clock emergency and inpatient care option with the opening of ChristianaCare Hospital, Aston, in early June. The hospital, designed to meet the increasing healthcare needs of the region, is expected to cater to about 15,000 patients annually, averaging around 40 patients per day. It will offer 24/7 emergency care, aiming to provide accessible healthcare services to the growing community.

data.title: ATN International, Inc. to Present and Host 1x1 Investor Meetings at the 16th Annual East Coast IDEAS Investor Conference on June 11, 2026 in New York
data.description: On May 29, 2026, in Beverly, ATN International, Inc. disclosed its participation in the 16th Annual East Coast IDEAS Investor Conference, slated for June 11, 2026, at The Westin New York at Times Square. ATN, a prominent player in digital infrastructure and communication services, under the Nasdaq ticker symbol ATNI, shared news of its management's involvement in the event.

data.title: TotalEnergies SE: Ordinary and Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meeting on May 29, 2026
data.description: An annual shareholders' meeting for TotalEnergies SE (Paris:TTE) (LSE:TTE) (NYSE:TTE) took place on May 29, 2026, with Mr. Patrick Pouyanné as chairman. All resolutions proposed by the Board of Directors were approved, including the endorsement of the 2025 financial statements and the declaration of a dividend amounting to €3.40 per share for that year. Additionally, Ms. Marie-Christine Coisne-Roquette and Ms. Anelise La were re-elected as Directors for another three-year term.
